patterns_identified.description: User prefers organized, structured approaches with clear milestones
evidence: Requested memory system with organized directory structure
Positive feedback for detailed technical breakdowns

patterns_identified.description: User values clear progress tracking and completion indicators
evidence: Positive response to roadmap with checkboxes
Requested stage tracking in memory system
Appreciated task breakdown with completion percentages

patterns_identified.description: User appreciates technical detail and comprehensive explanations
evidence: No requests for simplification or summarization

patterns_identified.description: User is comfortable with file operations and structured data formats
evidence: Requested creation of multiple JSON and MD files
No hesitation with technical file structures

patterns_identified.description: User wants agent to learn and adapt based on preferences and feedback
evidence: Explicit request to 'learn from what I like and not'
Request for stage tracking in memory system

recommended_approaches.approach: Create detailed roadmaps with checkboxes, structured breakdowns, and clear success criteria
recommended_approaches.rationale: Matches user's demonstrated preference for structured, trackable planning

recommended_approaches.approach: Build organized directory structures with clear configuration files and documentation
recommended_approaches.rationale: Aligns with user's comfort with file operations and structured data

recommended_approaches.approach: Continuously update memory system based on feedback and observed preferences
recommended_approaches.rationale: Directly addresses user's request for learning from likes/dislikes
